things.name: Bastille Fortress
things.description: 19th-century fort reached by the Telepherique bubble cable car with panoramic alpine views

things.name: Musee de Grenoble
things.description: One of France's finest art museums with over 900 works from the 13th century to today

things.name: Vercors Regional Natural Park
things.description: Stunning limestone plateau with gorges, forests and skiing just 30 minutes away

things.name: Musee Dauphinois
things.description: Regional history museum in a 17th-century convent with exhibits on Alpine life

things.name: Place Grenette
things.description: Lively main square with cafes, restaurants and the city's vibrant market

things.name: Caserne de Bonne
things.description: Award-winning eco-district in converted military barracks with shops and green spaces

things.name: Old Town (Vieille Ville)
things.description: Charming historic quarter with Renaissance mansions, cafes and boutiques

things.name: Chartreuse Mountains
things.description: Spectacular natural park north of the city with the Grande Chartreuse monastery

things.name: Parc Paul Mistral
things.description: Large city park with the Tour Perret, an early reinforced concrete skyscraper

things.name: Skiing in the Alps
things.description: Gateway to world-class ski resorts including Chamrousse, Alpe d'Huez and Les Deux Alpes
